text:
*[Bug 19061] New: wrong size used when allocating for external routines in Rf_registerRoutines*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19061>

            Bug ID: 19061
           Summary: wrong size used when allocating for external routines
                    in Rf_registerRoutines
           Product: R
           Version: R-devel (trunk)
          Hardware: Other
                OS: Other
            Status: NEW
          Severity: normal
          Priority: P5
         Component: Low-level
          Assignee: <mailto:R-core@R-project.org|R-core@R-project.org>
          Reporter: <mailto:kevinushey@gmail.com|kevinushey@gmail.com>

Created attachment 3683
  --> <https://bugs.r-project.org/attachment.cgi?id=3683&action=edit>
Use n_ext rather than n_c for R_ExternalMethodDef.

See attached patch -- the size `n_c` rather than `n_ext` is used when
allocating the `externalRoutines` array.

         Component: Low-level

  --> <https://bugs.r-project.org/attachment.cgi?id=3684&action=edit>
